channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran Agrees to Facilitate Additional Pakistani Ships Through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: In a significant development for regional stability, Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Senator Ishaq Dar announced that Iran has agreed to permit 20 more Pakistani ships to pass through the S...

item.title: Tiger Woods arrested on DUI and other charges after Florida car crash
item.description: Former golf superstar Tiger Woods got arrested on Friday for driving under the influence after his Land Rover rolled over near his home at Jupiter Island, Florida. The 50-year-old, who is known for hi...

item.title: Pakistan’s FO dismisses India’s comments on treatment of Shia community
item.description: On Saturday, Pakistan’s Foreign Office (FO) firmly rejected comments from the Indian Ministry of External Affairs regarding the treatment of Shia Muslims in Pakistan. FO Spokesperson Tahir Andrabi lab...

item.title: Six doctors injured but survive after car accident returning from medical camp
item.description: In Kwimba District, Mwanza Region, six doctors from Sekou Toure Regional Referral Hospital narrowly survived a serious road accident while coming back from a medical outreach camp at Icheja Hospital. ...

item.title: Nestle Reports Theft of 12 Tonnes of KitKat in Europe Ahead of Easter
item.description: In a surprising incident, Swiss food giant Nestle has reported that a massive shipment of its KitKat chocolate bars, weighing approximately 12 tonnes, was stolen in Europe while being transported from...

item.title: Israeli forces to be investigated after alleged assault on CNN journalists in occupied West Bank
item.description: An international media association has strongly condemned Israeli soldiers for what it termed a violent assault on a CNN crew in the occupied West Bank. The incident occurred near the Palestinian vill...

item.title: Kilimanjaro Marathon 2026 boosts tourism, economy and wellness with support from Tanzania Breweries PLC
item.description: The 2026 edition of the Kilimanjaro Marathon took place in Moshi with thousands of runners, supporters and spectators gathering under the shadow of Mount Kilimanjaro. The event which started over two ...

item.title: Fifteen-year-old Palestinian boy killed during Israeli military raid near Bethlehem
item.description: A 15-year-old Palestinian boy was killed late on Friday near Bethlehem, in the Israeli-occupied West Bank, following a raid by the Israeli military. According to the Palestinian health ministry, the b...

item.title: Tanzanian Innovators Make Africa Prize Shortlist for Waste and Water Solutions
item.description: Two Tanzanian innovators, Mr Allen Kimambo and Ms Faith Kuya, have been shortlisted among 16 finalists for the Africa Prize for Engineering Innovation 2026. Their work focuses on critical challenges i...

item.title: Punjab Government Suspends Hospital Officials Over Breach of Medical Ethics in Viral Video
item.description: LAHORE: The Punjab government has taken strict action against the management and staff of Lady Willingdon Hospital after a disturbing video went viral on social media. The video showed doctors perform...

item.title: Russia-Indonesia Strengthen Economic and Energy Partnerships with Focus on Nuclear Power and Tourism
item.description: Under President Prabowo Subianto, Indonesia is fostering strong friendly ties with Russia, reflected by its rapid entry into BRICS in January 2025, shortly after the president's inauguration. The pers...

item.title: Punjab Health Department Suspends Training Over Unethical Surgical Video
item.description: In Lahore, the Punjab health department has taken strict action against four female postgraduate doctors from Lady Willingdon Hospital for recording and sharing a video of a C-section procedure on soc...

item.title: El-Rufai Returns to Abuja Home After Being Released on Bail by ICPC for Mother’s Funeral
item.description: The former Governor of Kaduna State, Nasir El-Rufai, don return to him residence for Abuja after the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) release am. The release ...

item.title: Tanzania sends 150 vocational instructors to India for technical training to improve teaching quality
item.description: Tanzania’s vocational education sector is making another step forward as 150 government instructors from across the country prepare to travel to India for an intensive skills development programme. Th...

item.title: Israel faces pressure over depletion of missile interceptor stockpiles amid prolonged conflict with Iran
item.description: As the Middle East war stretches into its second month, concerns are mounting over Israel’s ability to sustain its high interception rates against continuous Iranian and Hezbollah missile attacks. Alt...

item.title: Islamabad administration denies sealing Edhi control room in Aabpara
item.description: The Islamabad district administration has denied Edhi’s claim that its office or control room in Aabpara was sealed, saying no such action was taken at any point. The issue emerged after Edhi’s Islama...

item.title: Significant reduction in terrorism in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa after Operation Ghazab lil-Haq, police report
item.description: According to the Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) police, incidents of terrorism in the province have declined by 65% since the launch of Operation Ghazab lil-Haq in response to growing militant threats from a...

item.title: Top family-friendly spring outings across the UK
item.description: This Guardian feature highlights twenty inviting family-friendly activities and day trips across the United Kingdom to enjoy over spring 2026, especially during the Easter holidays. From birdwatching ...

item.title: Baarle Installs Swing Straddling Belgian-Dutch Border
item.description: In a unique and playful initiative, the towns of Baarle-Hertog in Belgium and Baarle-Nassau in the Netherlands have installed the world's first swing positioned directly over their international borde...

item.title: Tanzania recognised for excellence in public debt management at Commonwealth awards
item.description: Tanzania continues to shine globally after being named the overall winner at the 2026 Commonwealth Public Debt Management Awards, also taking home the title of Best Debt Management Office in Africa. T...
